metadata.name: model-upgrade-automation-tg2-baseline
metadata.description: Composes the TG2 infrastructure, identity, and governance baseline for private-networked Foundry evaluation workloads.
Azure region for all resource group-scoped resources.
Short workload prefix used to construct resource names.
Deployment environment name.
Instance suffix used to keep resource names unique within the environment.
Object ID of the Microsoft Entra application or service principal used by GitHub Actions OIDC federation.
The GitHub repository that is allowed to federate into Azure. Format: org/repo.
The GitHub branch ref that is allowed to federate into Azure. Example: refs/heads/main.
Resource tags applied to all resources deployed by this baseline.

metadata.name: networking
metadata.description: Deploys the private-network baseline for model-upgrade-automation, including the VNet, delegated subnets, and private DNS zones.
Azure region for the networking resources.
Virtual network name.
Delegated subnet for the internal Container Apps environment.
Subnet dedicated to private endpoints.
Resource tags applied to the networking resources.
The resource ID of the delegated ACA subnet.
The resource ID of the private endpoint subnet.
Private DNS zones keyed by service contract name.

metadata.name: monitoring
metadata.description: Deploys the Log Analytics workspace and Application Insights instance used by the TG2 baseline.
Azure region for monitoring resources.
Name of the Log Analytics workspace.
Name of the Application Insights component.
Resource tags applied to monitoring resources.
The Log Analytics workspace customer ID used by Container Apps.
The Log Analytics shared key used by Container Apps environment provisioning.
The Application Insights connection string for workflow/runtime configuration.

metadata.name: storage
metadata.description: Deploys the private-only storage account used for Blob artifacts and Table skip-index history.
Azure region for the storage account.
Name of the storage account.
Resource ID of the subnet that hosts private endpoints.
Private DNS zone resource IDs keyed by service contract name.
Resource tags applied to the storage resources.
Resource ID of the storage account.
Storage services that support the TG1 data artifact contract.

metadata.name: keyvault
metadata.description: Deploys the private-only Key Vault used for optional notification and remediation secrets.
Azure region for the Key Vault.
Name of the Key Vault.
Resource ID of the subnet that hosts private endpoints.
Private DNS zone resource IDs keyed by service contract name.
Resource tags applied to the Key Vault resources.
Resource ID of the Key Vault.

metadata.name: foundry
metadata.description: Deploys the Azure AI Foundry account baseline with private-only connectivity and a private endpoint contract for evaluator access.
Azure region for the Foundry resources.
Name of the Azure AI Foundry account.
Resource ID of the subnet that hosts private endpoints.
Private DNS zone resource IDs keyed by service contract name.
Resource tags applied to Foundry resources.
Resource ID of the Azure AI Foundry account.

metadata.name: container-apps
metadata.description: Deploys the internal Container Apps environment that hosts the evaluator job definition and managed identity contract.
Azure region for the Container Apps resources.
Name of the Container Apps environment.
Resource ID of the delegated subnet used by the internal Container Apps environment.
Log Analytics workspace customer ID used to connect diagnostics.
Log Analytics workspace shared key used to connect diagnostics.
Resource tags applied to Container Apps resources.
Resource ID of the Container Apps environment.
Principal ID of the evaluator job managed identity.

metadata.name: rbac
metadata.description: Assigns least-privilege roles to the GitHub OIDC principal and the Container Apps managed identity.
Object ID of the Microsoft Entra application or service principal used by GitHub Actions OIDC federation.
Principal ID of the Container Apps managed identity.
Resource ID of the Azure AI Foundry account.
Resource ID of the storage account.
Resource ID of the Key Vault.
Role names assigned by the TG2 baseline.

metadata.name: governance-definitions
metadata.description: Defines the TG2 custom policy definitions for private-only services and required tags.
Tag names and expected values enforced by the TG2 baseline.

properties.displayName: TG2 Require private-only Azure AI Foundry
properties.description: Denies Azure AI Foundry accounts that enable public network access or local key-based auth.
Denies storage accounts that expose public network access, shared keys, or public blob access.
Denies Key Vaults that expose public network access.
Requires the workload tag with the TG2 baseline value.
Requires the environment tag with the TG2 baseline value.
Requires the managedBy tag with the TG2 baseline value.
Requires the taskGroup tag with the TG2 baseline value.
Requires the owner tag used by the orphan sweep contract.
Requires the cleanup tag used by ephemeral resource sweeps.

metadata.description: Custom policy definition names created by the TG2 governance baseline.
Policy definition IDs consumed by the TG2 assignment bundle.
Policy definition IDs consumed by the TG2 assignment bundle.
Policy definition IDs consumed by the TG2 assignment bundle.
Policy definition IDs consumed by the TG2 assignment bundle.
Policy definition IDs consumed by the TG2 assignment bundle.
Policy definition IDs consumed by the TG2 assignment bundle.
Policy definition IDs consumed by the TG2 assignment bundle.
Policy definition IDs consumed by the TG2 assignment bundle.
Policy definition IDs consumed by the TG2 assignment bundle.

metadata.name: governance
metadata.description: Assigns the TG2 governance guardrails at the target resource-group scope.
Azure region used for policy assignment metadata.
Policy definition ID for the Foundry private-only guardrail.
Policy definition ID for the Storage private-only guardrail.
Policy definition ID for the Key Vault private-only guardrail.
Policy definition ID for the workload tag requirement.
Policy definition ID for the environment tag requirement.
Policy definition ID for the managedBy tag requirement.
Policy definition ID for the taskGroup tag requirement.
Policy definition ID for the owner tag requirement.
Policy definition ID for the cleanup tag requirement.

properties.description: Applies the TG2 private-only guardrail for Azure AI Foundry.
Applies the TG2 private-only guardrail for Storage.
Applies the TG2 private-only guardrail for Key Vault.
Requires the workload tag for TG2-managed resources.
Requires the environment tag for TG2-managed resources.
Requires the managedBy tag for TG2-managed resources.
Requires the taskGroup tag for TG2-managed resources.
Requires the owner tag for ephemeral-resource ownership tracking.
Requires the cleanup tag for ephemeral-resource sweep contracts.

metadata.description: Policy assignment names that TG3 must validate before enabling live delivery runs.
Policy definition names referenced by the TG2 assignment bundle.
Resource name map that TG3 uses to hydrate RunContext and workflow environment variables.
OIDC contract inputs for TG3 workflow authoring.
Private DNS zones created for private-only data-plane access.
Network contract consumed by TG3 for private-only runtime validation.
Governance guardrails and validation targets that TG3 must preserve.
TG3 validation checklist anchors derived from the TG2 baseline.

dns: Resolve Foundry through privatelink.cognitiveservices.azure.com from the ACA subnet path.
[format('Resolve Blob through privatelink.blob.{0} from the ACA subnet path.', environment().suffixes.storage)]
[format('Resolve Table through privatelink.table.{0} from the ACA subnet path.', environment().suffixes.storage)]
Resolve Key Vault through privatelink.vaultcore.azure.net from the ACA subnet path.
identity: GitHub Actions authenticates with OIDC only and uses no client secret.
The GitHub principal retains only resource-group-scoped Contributor access unless replaced by a narrower custom role.
The ACA managed identity can invoke Foundry and write Blob/Table history without storage keys or connection strings.
governance: Tagged resources include workload, environment, managedBy, taskGroup, owner, and cleanup.
Public network access remains disabled for Foundry, Storage, and Key Vault.
Private endpoint guardrails are assigned at the deployment scope before TG3 enables live runs.
